data.title: Capricor Therapeutics Announces Late-Breaking Presentation of HOPE-3 Phase 3 Results at the American Academy of Neurology 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in San Diego, Capricor Therapeutics announced the unveiling of data from its Phase 3 HOPE-3 clinical trial of Deramiocel in Duchenne muscular dystrophy at the American Academy of Neurology (AAN) 2026 Annual Meeting in Chicago, Illinois. Dr. Aravindhan Veerapandiyan, Associate Professor and Director of the Comprehensive Neuromuscular Program at Arkansas Children's Hospital, presented the findings during the Late-Breaking Science 2 session on April 21, 2026. Capricor Therapeutics, a biotechnology company focusing on cell and exosome-based therapeutics for rare diseases, trades on NASDAQ under the ticker CAPR.

data.title: Johnson Controls' 2026 sustainability report highlights energy efficiency returns in mission-critical industries
data.description: The company has significantly benefited its customers by assisting them in saving over $9.5 billion in energy and operating expenses, while also preventing emissions equal to those of almost 6 million U.S. homes. This has allowed customers to have more capital available to invest in strategic growth initiatives. The company itself has made impressive progress by reducing Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 46% since 2017, and achieving a 33% reduction in...

data.title: Google and HP Receive Frost & Sullivan's 2026 Global New Product Innovation Recognition for Advancing 3D Video Communications and Human-Centric Collaboration
data.description: Frost & Sullivan recently praised Google and HP for their revolutionary advancements in transforming video communications to offer more engaging and realistic experiences, positioning themselves as leaders in digital transformation. The recognition was given on April 22, 2026, in San Antonio.

data.title: KnowBe4 Selects Flywire as Global Payments Partner to Transform International Invoice-to-Cash Operations
data.description: KnowBe4, a provider of AI risk management solutions, has chosen Flywire to streamline its entire invoicing process for its worldwide B2B clientele.

data.title: BBOT Announces the Appointment of Pedro J. Beltran, PhD, as Chief Executive Officer, Idan Elmelech as Chief Operating Officer, and Neil Kumar, PhD, as Executive Chairman
data.description: Pedro J. Beltran, a highly experienced executive with a PhD, has been appointed as the Chief Executive Officer of BBOT. Beltran, who formerly held the position of Chief Scientific Officer at the company, will now lead as the top executive. He is known for his significant expertise in drug development and strong scientific and business capabilities. This change in leadership marks a significant development for BBOT.

data.title: Savaria Declares Monthly Dividend
data.description: In Laval on April 22, 2026, Savaria Corporation, a leading global player in accessibility solutions (TSX: SIS), announced a dividend of 4.67 cents ($0.0467) per common share. The dividend follows their monthly policy and will be distributed on May 8, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 30, 2026. This dividend is classified as eligible under the Income Tax Act.

data.title: Netskope Announces AI Guardrails Solution Powered by Google Cloud TPUs to Help Secure High-Performance AI Workflows at Scale
data.description: Netskope has recently revealed an enhanced collaboration with Google Cloud aiming to provide improved performance and security for AI operations. This partnership is a strategic move by the companies to bolster their offerings in the rapidly growing AI sector. Through this alliance, Netskope intends to leverage Google Cloud's advanced infrastructure and resources to enhance the efficiency and security of AI workflows. This collaboration is expected to benefit a significant number of users in the AI domain, with the aim of streamlining operations and ensuring the highest level of security for their workflows.

data.title: MAAS Announces Launch of Stars Distributed Intelligent Computing Center Project with its Partners, with a Total Planned Investment of up to RMB5 Billion
data.description: In Qingdao, China, on April 22, 2026, Maase Inc. (NASDAQ: MAAS), also known as MAAS, revealed the commencement of the "Stars Distributed Intelligent Computing Center Project" in partnership with Huazhi Future (Chongqing) Technology Co., Ltd., China Power Computing Technology Application (Beijing) Co., Ltd., and Sino-International Yuzhi (Chongqing) Technology Co., Ltd. This initiative, with a staggering planned investment totaling up to RMB5 billion, aligns with the Chinese government's strategic directives of "East-to-West Computing Resource Transfer" and "Xinjiang-to-Chongqing Computing Resource Transfer." The primary objective of the project is to establish a sophisticated computing infrastructure network across vital areas, provide swiftly deployable standardized computing units, and boost the regional computing supply capacity and efficiency.

data.title: OneMedNet Goes Live with 80 Million Patient Journeys and Billions of Records
data.description: OneMedNet has successfully launched a system capable of handling 80 million patient journeys and accessing billions of records within seconds. This feat has been achieved by leveraging the Palantir Foundry technology. Through this advanced system, users can quickly search and retrieve crucial medical information with unprecedented efficiency.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: GE Vernova Unveils New Initiative on Earth Day at NYSE
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) releases a daily pre-market advisory straight from the trading floor in New York. The update, dated April 22, 2026, offers key market insights before the official trading session begins. Investors can access this NYSE pre-market briefing for important information before engaging in trading activities.

data.title: Clean Eatz Kitchen Publishes Senior Meal Delivery Comparison Ahead of Older Americans Month, Identifies Subscription Model as Key Barrier for Family Caregivers
data.description: A recent study discovered that subscription meal delivery services present difficulties with recurring charges and cancellations for the 53 million Americans looking after their elderly parents. As a solution, Clean Eatz Kitchen provides dietitian-formulated frozen meals priced at $8.99 each, without the need for a subscription and featuring complimentary shipping on all orders.

data.title: Online Labels Group Earns 19th Eugene Singer Award, Recognized for Operational Excellence and Industry Leadership
data.description: In Sanford, Fla., on April 22, 2026, Online Labels Group was announced as a winner of the 2026 Eugene Singer Award from the Tag and Label Manufacturers Institute (TLMI). This recognition represents the nineteenth occasion that the company has achieved this prestigious award, solidifying its position among the top performers in the industry.

data.title: Tesla Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla, Inc. is set to report its first-quarter earnings on April 22 after the market closes. Analysts are predicting earnings of 30 cents per share, showing an increase from the previous year's 27 cents per share. The consensus revenue estimate for this quarter is $22.17 billion, up from $19.34 billion last year. Tesla has exceeded revenue expectations for the past three quarters and in four out of the last 10 quarters. On the day before the announcement, Tesla's stock price fell by 1.6% to $386.42. For more details and the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Where Have All the Hotlines Gone? New Parloa Study Signals Growing Risk in Customer Accessibility
data.description: A recent benchmark conducted by AI agents on enterprise customer experience revealed a widespread presence of automation, with chatbots and IVR trees being common. However, the study found that effective resolution and personal connection with customers are lacking. The research, conducted in New York on April 22, 2026, highlighted the need for improvements in the customer service sector.

data.title: Caraway Tea Company Expands Functional Tea Manufacturing with Adaptogen and Mushroom-Based Blends
data.description: In Poughkeepsie, New York, on April 22, 2026, the Caraway Tea Company, an American company known for producing high-quality teas and herbal products, is increasing its production capacity to meet the rising interest in functional tea blends. These blends include adaptogens and botanical ingredients.

data.title: EDB Delivers "Intelligence per Watt" Paradigm to Slash Token Consumption and Cut Data Center Emissions by up to 87%
data.description: Recent performance tests have demonstrated that EDB Postgres® AI outperforms traditional methods with a 5x to 12x faster vector indexing and up to a 57% reduction in token usage. These benchmarks highlight the importance of optimizing the data layer for AI efficiency, rather than relying solely on GPU processing. The tests were conducted in WILMINGTON, Del. on April 22, 2026, showcasing the potential benefits of leveraging EDB Postgres® AI.

data.title: Illinois CPA Society Honors Founder of Teel & Company Strategists & CPAs with Distinguished Service Award
data.description: Insight's recent publications delve into the differentiation between advisory services and embedded operational responsibility in Client Advisory Services. Chicago, April 22, 2026 - Chuck Teel CPA has been acknowledged by the Illinois CPA Society, receiving the Distinguished Service Award.
